capnwasm playground

A world where everyone speaks Cap'n Proto. Every Cloudflare API endpoint is a dot on the orange globe at its real PoP. Click any dot — the page encodes the endpoint identity as Cap'n Proto wire bytes via capnp.slim.wasm, decodes the response from a Cloudflare Worker, and pops a bubble at the dot's lat/lng.

← Landing· Playground· Render bench· Snippets· Dynamic· OpenAPI· Wire inspector· Chat· Notes· vs capnweb
Loading Cloudflare endpoints…

Cloudflare API endpoints

Loading…

Mouse over a row or globe dot to preview it. Click the bubble, dot, or row to open the request dialog.

Every dot is a real endpoint from cloudflare-openapi.json. Mouse over a row or spot to preview it; click the chat bubble to open an OpenAPI-style request dialog with Cloudflare SDK examples across languages. Run encodes the request through capnp.slim.wasm, sends it to the Worker, and returns a mock response.

OpenAPI request

Endpoint

Example payload

Choose a language tab, edit the payload, then run.

Mock response
